summary: Seongdong's narrow DPK hold (박성준 50.81 vs 이혜훈 48.53 in 중구·성동 을) reflects rapid gentrification in Seongsu (뚝섬, tech/creative cluster) shifting the electorate toward younger professional demographics while raising real-estate political salience.

issues.label: Seongsu gentrification
issues.description: Seongsu's transformation into a tech-creative cluster reshaped demographics and real-estate politics.

issues.label: Young-professional influx
issues.description: Younger, professional, creative-industry residents drive recent political character.

issues.label: Rising property-value politics
issues.description: Rising property values introduce Gangnam-style real-estate concerns to historically progressive gu.
